raw_text:
E-signing of Contracts
ACBA Bank has expanded its remote customer service capabilities by introducing an electronic contract signing system.
Tab: Signing a contract online
ACBA Bank customers can now apply for a number of loans without visiting the Bank.
The new solution takes the Bank-customer relationship to a qualitatively new level, thanks to which the customers save their time and staying at home at the current position, do not endanger their health.
Tab: Sequence of steps
Sequence of steps taken by the customer to sign a loan agreement
Step 1
An offer to sign the documents is sent to the customer's e-mail address, which will be active for
10
working days.
Step 2
After getting acquainted with the loan documents, the customer clicks on "
Next to sign
" and enters the one-time password sent to their phone number.
Step 3
After entering the password correctly, the customer clicks on "
Sign Documents
" .
Step 4
The documents approved by the Bank are sent
by a separate e-mail
to the customer's e-mail. The loan amount is transferred to the customer's account at the same time, automatically charging the one-time loan commission.
Tab: Loan types
Electronic signing of loan agreements without loan formulation can be done without collateral and without guarantor in case of the following types of loans:
Loan
Amount
Consumer loan
Up to 10 mln
AMD
Card credit line
Up to 5 mln
AMD
(equivalent foreign currency)
Non-recoverable card credit line
Up to 2 mln
AMD
(equivalent foreign currency)
Agricultural loan
Up to 5 mln
AMD
(equivalent foreign currency)
Tab: Terms
Term of e-signing of loan package by the customer:
The customer shall be properly identified by the Bank
The customer shall have a telephone number registered with and verified by the Bank
The customer shall have an e-mail address registered with and verified by the Bank.
CTA links
acba digital: https://www.acbadigital.am
Last updated: In case of any discrepancies in the information contained in the Site, as well as inaccurate texts in a foreign language, please be guided by the Armenian version. 09.09.2025 11:24

tabs.title: Sequence of steps
tabs.content_html:
Sequence of steps taken by the customer to sign a loan agreement

  • Step 1

An offer to sign the documents is sent to the customer's e-mail address, which will be active for 10 working days.

  • Step 2

After getting acquainted with the loan documents, the customer clicks on "Next to sign" and enters the one-time password sent to their phone number.

  • Step 3

After entering the password correctly, the customer clicks on "Sign Documents" .

  • Step 4

The documents approved by the Bank are sent by a separate e-mail to the customer's e-mail. The loan amount is transferred to the customer's account at the same time, automatically charging the one-time loan commission.
